top_signals.title: Fed’s Schmid Says Officials Must Stay Focused on Inflation - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Fed’s Schmid Says Officials Must Stay Focused on Inflation  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: PacSun 'Co-Creating' Brand to Reach Gen Z
top_signals.summary: PacSun CEO Brieane Olson said that the retailer has built a resurgence by 'co-creating' and listening to a live feedback loop of what Gen Z consumers want to see from the retailer instead of treating young people like a static audience. She said brands have to shit the notion of control and relinquish it some to gain more 'brand and community trust.' (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: I was at the exclusive launch of Ferrari's new EV that sent the stock tumbling. But there may be light at the end of the tunnel
top_signals.summary: Is there a "luce" at the end of the tunnel for Ferrari's first electric vehicle?

top_signals.title: Pentagon looks to reinvent the bunker-buster bomb
top_signals.summary: The goal is to go beyond the traditional brute-force approach of giant bombs and instead manipulate shock waves to destroy targets.

top_signals.title: Coinbase brings global crypto derivatives markets to US institutional clients
top_signals.summary: The exchange's integration with Deribit gives eligible US institutional investors access to global crypto options and perpetual futures markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: California AG sues 23andMe over 2023 breach exposing health data
top_signals.summary: California Attorney General Rob Bonta filed a lawsuit against 23andMe, now Chrome Holding Co., over the company's failure to protect sensitive customer genetic and personal information. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
